weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 16 total findings, tracking 14 unique CVEs across various domains, including Browser Extensions, Cloud/IAM, and Containers/K8s. The most frequently seen CVEs included CVE-2026-42208, which appeared twice, as well as several others that appeared once, such as CVE-2026-44931 and CVE-2026-4782. The majority of these findings were concentrated on a single day, May 11, 2026, indicating a notable surge in security activity during this period, with multiple domains being affected, including Identity/Auth, OS/Kernel, and Web/Servers.
